about.description: AstroCET is the esteemed astronomy club of the College of Engineering Trivandrum (CET).
about.fullText: AstroCET has embarked on a journey of astronomical proportions over the past year. Established in 2019 as a humble hobby club, AstroCET has now evolved into a beacon of celestial exploration, fostering camaraderie among students while diving deeper into the technical facets of the cosmos.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: AstroCET aims to lead in astronomy education and outreach, inspiring students and the public to explore the cosmos. By fostering skill development, collaborating with institutions, and promoting innovation, the club seeks to create an inclusive environment, expand its reach, and contribute to scientific knowledge.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: The club's primary mission is to ignite a passion for astronomy among students and the general public, providing a platform for learning, exploration, and innovation.

events.title: Astrophotography Workshop
events.description: ASTRO-CET hosted an astrophotography workshop with CET SHUTTERBUGS and AASTRO KERALA, led by renowned expert Sarath Prabhavu J.

events.title: Solar Probing Workshop
events.description: Expedition Aditya, held in collaboration with Shastra Snehi, focused on solar probing and sunspot viewing, exploring the Sun's dynamics.

announcement.title: Website Launch
announcement.description: We are excited to announce the launch of the new AstroCET website! This online platform is designed to be your go-to resource for all things astronomy.

contact.socialSubtitle: Follow our journey through the cosmos
